review_reason: Proof strategy blocker: The substitution approach requires neg(atom p) in M' for contradiction, but neg(atom p) mentions p and is not in atomFreeSubset M p, so it's not guaranteed to be in M'. The proof needs fundamental revision - either global freshness (impossible for infinite M) or a different approach.

artifacts.summary: Partial implementation with 2 sorries: atomFreeSubset, namingSet, naming_set_consistent (partial), main theorem skeleton

partial_progress.blocking_issue: Substitution proof requires neg(atom p) in M' but this fails because neg(atom p) is not p-free
